scripts.deploy:markers:get: npm run build && cd dist/functions && zip -r ../../markers-get.zip markers/get shared && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name cairn-dev-markers-get --zip-file fileb://../../markers-get.zip --profile cairn-dev && cd ../.. && rm markers-get.zip
scripts.deploy:markers:create: npm run build && cd dist/functions && zip -r ../../markers-create.zip markers/create shared && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name cairn-dev-markers-create --zip-file fileb://../../markers-create.zip --profile cairn-dev && cd ../.. && rm markers-create.zip
scripts.deploy:markers:update: npm run build && cd dist/functions && zip -r ../../markers-update.zip markers/update shared && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name cairn-dev-markers-update --zip-file fileb://../../markers-update.zip --profile cairn-dev && cd ../.. && rm markers-update.zip
scripts.deploy:markers:delete: npm run build && cd dist/functions && zip -r ../../markers-delete.zip markers/delete shared && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name cairn-dev-markers-delete --zip-file fileb://../../markers-delete.zip --profile cairn-dev && cd ../.. && rm markers-delete.zip
scripts.deploy:markers: npm run deploy:markers:create && npm run deploy:markers:delete && npm run deploy:markers:get && npm run deploy:markers:update
